title: OwlCC - 完美改造 claudecode 的本地源代码，支持本地模型和云端模型自由切换
content: OwlCC rewrites Claude Code’s full TUI to run on local models. It translates Claude’s Anthropic Messages API into OpenAI Chat Completions and forwards requests to local backends such as Ollama, LM Studio, or vLLM. Features include free, local deployment, switchable models (Qwen, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek), effortless model switching via `/model`, local search with SearXNG, observability tools, fault tolerance, and a skill system that adapts to user coding habits. It lacks extended thinking, depends on local model quality, and offers no official support. Note: the project requires you to supply Claude Code’s TypeScript source.
eventKey: owlcc-完美改造-claudecode-的本地源代码-支持本地模型和云端模型自由切换

The 180,000‑word book, available on Amazon and at a low price on domestic marketplaces, can be read in about six to nine hours. Highlights include Zhao’s near‑appointment as Mt. Gox China CEO, a near‑loss of 100 BTC when the platform crashed in February 2014, and a story about writing his memoir while serving time in prison.

title: 科学家要失业了？GPT-5仅用18分钟解出黑洞方程，效率碾压人类数月
content: AI is rapidly becoming a research partner across disciplines. In 2025, GPT‑5 models solved complex math problems, helped prove a Nesterov‑accelerated optimization theorem in three nights, and generated a black‑hole tidal response equation in 18 minutes, matching insights from expert Alex Lupsasca. In biology, GPT‑4B Micro designed protein sequences that accelerate cell reprogramming, outperforming previous methods. Scientists now use AI for code generation, data analysis, mathematical derivation, and literature review, accelerating discoveries toward 2050 scientific goals.

title: MacState v1.8.0 发布，轻量级 macOS 菜单栏系统监控工具
content:
MacState v1.8.0 已发布。轻量级 macOS 菜单栏系统监控工具，纯 Swift 开发，零第三方依赖，所有指标合并显示在单个状态栏项中，资源占用极低。 状态栏

设置面板

充电信息

优化 / Improved
设置图标合并 — 设置齿轮图标合并到指标状态栏项中（最右侧），不再独立占位，状态栏更紧凑
CPU 占用大幅降低 — 从 11-15% 降至 ~3%：GPUService 合并 IOKit 枚举并缓存结果；BatteryService 缓存 service handle；SMCService 温度/风扇缓存多个…

title: DeepSeek 上线专家模式：产品首次引入分层设计，V4 模型传闻再起
content:
DeepSeek 网页端迎来重要更新，在输入框上方新增「快速模式」与「专家模式」两项功能。这是 DeepSeek 自年初走红以来，首次在产品端引入模式分层设计。与此同时，带有图片图标的「视觉模型」功能也已开启灰度测试。 此次上线的两种模式在生成速度与任务处理范围上形成明显区分。快速模式侧重于日常对话与即时响应，适合处理简单快速的问答场景，同时支持上传图片和文件进行文字识别。专家模式则更擅长处理复杂任务，如内容生成、代码编程、网页开发等，具备深度思考和智能搜索能力，但目前暂不支持多模态文件上传，且处于限量供应状态。

据 DeepSeek…

title: 罗福莉再发声，Agent 时代模型订阅制凉了？
content: Rob Felix warns LLM firms against price wars before stabilizing coding-plan revenue. He cites Anthropic’s shift—disallowing Claude Pro/Max subscriptions for OpenClaw use—to illustrate costly, unpredictable token consumption in agent‑driven tasks. Agent models now face inflated, variable usage, undermining flat subscription plans. Felix argues for tighter context management and smarter token use, and notes that only a combined subscription‑quota‑api model can cushion these disparities. The debate points toward higher efficiency and new pricing models in the agent era.

title: BitTorrent 创始人炮轰 Claude 团队：Vibe Coding 已走火入魔
content: Bram Cohen, the founder of the BitTorrent protocol, criticizes Anthropic’s Claude team for embracing “Vibe Coding” – a practice where developers rely entirely on AI to generate code without reviewing or contributing to the underlying logic. He argues this leads to poor code quality, evidenced by the leaked Claude Code, which contains redundant patterns. Cohen stresses that AI should aid in cleaning technical debt rather than replace human oversight, and that responsible coding requires human review and accountability.

title: 阿里电商 AI 新动向：围绕 Token 重构电商，组织迎来新一轮调整｜独家
content: Alibaba’s Chinese e‑commerce group is realigning around AI and a token economy, guided by a new Alibaba Token Hub. The focus shifts to AI‑to‑B tools, aiming to boost GMV and merchant retention while phasing out duplicate efforts. Organizational changes split AI functions into platform‑user and algorithm teams, integrate a multi‑modal innovation unit into ATH, and launch the “QianNiu Claw” AI‑agent service for sellers. The strategy targets cost reduction, efficiency gains, and new revenue metrics based on token usage.

title: AI 对 IT 行业的真实冲击：不是狼来了，是狼已经在门口了
content:
JeecgBoot AI 专题观察 * 一个深度使用 AI 编程半年的开发者，聊聊这个行业正在发生什么、程序员该怎么办 从手写汇编到高级语言，从高级语言到框架，从框架到低代码 —— 每一次技术跃迁，都有人说程序员要失业了。结果呢？需求膨胀得更快，程序员反而更多了。这次 AI 的冲击比以往任何一次都大，但底层逻辑相似 —— 变的是做事方式，不变的是解决问题的需求。

先说结论

AI 不会消灭程序员，但会重新定义 "程序员" 这三个字的含义。

这不是贩卖焦虑。过去半年，我每天都在用 AI 写代码、改 Bug、搭架构。感受非常直接 —— 有些事…
source: 开源中国-全部 - JEECG官方

normalizedTitle: ai 对 it 行业的真实冲击 不是狼来了 是狼已经在门口了

title: 智元升级 Genie Sim 3.0 一站式仿真开发平台
content:
智元宣布 Genie Sim3.0 一站式仿真开发平台迎来新升级。通过环境生成、场景泛化、数据采集到模型评测的全流程仿真，显著加速模型训练验证，提升开发者与研究者的研发效率，推动具身智能的创新应用。 图文生境：无需建模、采集或硬件，仅文本或图片输入，用户即可零门槛生成海量场景。通过多模态大模型，用户指令一改、场景即换，无限泛化。
极速生成：空间世界模型单次推理即可完成构建，生成速度从“小时级”提升至“分钟级”，实时仿真、动态交互即开即用。
虚实一致：RGB、深度、激光雷达等多模态数据原生同步输出，实现仿真数据与真实世界的浑然一体。

针对机器人算法…

content: 在当今高并发、分布式的系统架构中，缓存已成为提升应用性能、降低数据库负载的核心组件。随着业务规模的扩大与系统复杂度的增加，缓存的使用和管理面临诸多挑战：部署模式多样、容灾策略不一、数据一致性保障困难等问题日益凸显。

title: Syncthing 2.0.16 正式发布，连续文件同步工具
content:
Syncthing 是一个免费开源的工具，它能在你的各个网络计算机间同步文件 / 文件夹，它的同步数据是直接从一个系统中直接传输到另一个系统的，并且它是安全且私密的。 Syncthing 2.0.15 现已发布，具体更新内容如下：

修复

fix(protocol)：在解压缩之前验证压缩消息的长度 #10595
fix(systemd)：支持对 syncOwnership 的覆盖 #10602
fix(systemd)：重新添加允许的 chown 系统调用 #10605

其他

chore(config, connections)：对…

content:
腾讯宣布上线国内首个浏览器“龙虾”—— QQ 浏览器 QBotClaw，免下载安装。打开 QQ 浏览器电脑端，点击“AI”按钮即可使用。 目前首期上线Mac版本，Windows版本也将于近期上线。

根据介绍，QBotClaw 支持自由配置国内其他主流大模型 API Key。支持微信直连；借助微信 Clawbot，发句指令就能远程调动电脑，完成跨软件操作、信息抓取及文件处理 。

QBotClaw 具备深度记忆能力，内置自研的 QQ 浏览器 Skill，高精度网页识别技术，再复杂的网页按钮都能一眼识别。

title: Firefox 149.0.2 发布
content:
Firefox 149.0.2 现已发布，具体更新内容如下： Fixed

修复了多个安全问题。
修复了网页某些部分（例如下拉菜单和特定样式）在打印时显示不正确的问题。（Bug 2026109）
修复了部分网站错误页面显示通用连接消息而非服务器提供的具体错误代码和描述的问题。（Bug 2023800）
修复了使用某些安全密钥或 WebAuthn 功能进行双因素身份验证时发生的崩溃问题。（Bug 2026688）
修复了在 Linux 系统上使用 Wayland 时，拖动标签页后浏览器工具栏可能对鼠标点击无响应的问题。（Bug 2022238）
修复了…

content: Anthropic released Claude Mythos Preview, a high‑performance model excelling in code repair and math reasoning, but capped behind a 40‑partner contract due to security risks. Project Glasswing partners with major tech firms to use Mythos for defensive vulnerability scanning, under a $100 million credit. Zai released large‑scale GLM‑5.1 (754 B parameters) for Agentic tasks, while GCP’s DeepSeek added “Fast” and “Expert” modes. Other highlights include Microsoft’s Harrier embedding model topping MTEB‑v2, Meta’s EUPE perception encoder for edge devices, and GitHub Copilot CLI now supporting BYOK. OpenAI’s Codex user base hit 3 M, and OpenAI Prism launched a paper‑reviewer workflow. The day also saw Firmus’ $5 M+ funding, Intel’s Terafab partnership, and cross‑vendor efforts to curb adversarial model copying.

title: Claude Code 的 skills 源码解析
content: Claude Code's “skills” system restructures LLM interactions by packaging reusable ability units that include a markdown‑based `SKILL.md` definition, optional scripts, and resources. Skills are loaded from various directories (global, project, managed), parsed for frontmatter, and registered as prompt commands. When invoked via slash commands, the system compiles the markdown into a prompt, optionally runs shell commands, and supplies tool permissions. This design separates intent from execution, enabling modular, maintainable, and context‑aware AI tasks.
source: 掘金本周最热 - 古茗前端团队

normalizedTitle: claude code 的 skills 源码解析

content: DeepSeek V4 is expected to launch this month. A recent system crash and a new gray‑scale test confirmed an upcoming upgrade. A senior Weibo developer revealed a redesigned interface featuring Quick, Expert, and Vision modes. The new model lineup may include a Lite version, the standard DeepSeek V4, and a Vision variant. DeepSeek is also developing at least two large models powered by domestic AI chips and plans an AI‑coding specialized edition to compete with Anthropic and OpenAI.

title: 全球内存芯片短缺，苹果 Mac mini / Studio 发货严重延迟
content: Apple’s Mac mini and Mac Studio models requiring large memory have significant back‑order delays due to a global shortage of memory chips, driven largely by soaring demand from AI server builds. In the U.S. and China, high‑memory configurations can take up to 4–5 months to ship, with 64 GB M4 Pro Mac mini orders arriving in about 16–18 weeks. Even base models face roughly a one‑month delay, and the 256 GB M3 Ultra Mac Studio also awaits 4–5 months. Prices remain high, and near‑term improvements are unlikely.

title: 被称为「GPT-4o 之母」的 OpenAI 高管宣布离职
content: OpenAI executive Joanne Jang, known as the “mother of GPT‑4o,” announced her departure after 4½ years, without explaining the reason or her next move. She led the team that gave ChatGPT its core capabilities. Her exit adds to recent executive turnover, which has included multiple departures and disagreements between CEO and CFO over the IPO timeline. With OpenAI valued at $852 billion and preparing to go public, the instability in top management has raised broad concerns about the IPO process.

title: 携程集团将启动「无理由事假」管理实验
content: Ctrip Group will pilot a “no-reason personal leave” experiment starting May 1, 2026, in selected business units. Approximately 6,000 employees will be randomly assigned to either an experimental or control group. Those in the experimental group can take up to 45 additional paid days per year without needing to provide a reason, in addition to regular paid leave. The policy’s future adoption will depend on the results after one year.
